messages.text: The fifth planet was smaller than all the others, with room only for a lamp and a lamplighter who moved with tired precision.

messages.name: Lamplighter
messages.text: Good evening.
He lit the lamp. A minute later he put it out and said good morning, though no night had truly passed.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: Why do you do that?

messages.name: Lamplighter
messages.text: It is my duty. The schedule changed. The planet turns faster each year, but the order did not change.
Unlike the king, he did not love authority. Unlike the businessman, he did not pretend to be important. He was simply faithful.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: You are the only adult I might like, because your work is useful to someone besides yourself.

messages.name: Lamplighter
messages.text: Useful or not, the constant turning will exhaust me. I have no time to sleep. Good evening. Good morning.
The prince wished to help, but the planet was too small for both friendship and rest. He left with respect and regret.
The sixth planet was large and quiet. A geographer sat at a desk with thick books, ready to record mountains, rivers, and cities.

messages.name: Geographer
messages.text: Ah, an explorer. Tell me what you have seen.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: I have seen a flower, three volcanoes, and several serious adults.

messages.name: Geographer
messages.text: Flowers are temporary. We do not record temporary things in geography.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: Temporary means it will disappear?

messages.name: Geographer
messages.text: Yes. Sooner or later.
The word struck him harder than any command. He had left his rose alone under a sky where even petals could vanish.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: Where should I explore next?

messages.name: Geographer
messages.text: Earth. It has a good reputation. Many kings, many businessmen, many flowers, and many lamplighters.
The prince thanked him, but his heart stayed behind with the temporary rose. Records could not protect what they named.
He set out for Earth, carrying the faithful lamplighter in his thoughts and a new fear that love may have a schedule of its own.
The lamplighter kept no audience, gained no wealth, and received no praise. Still, each flame gave the prince a feeling of order in the dark.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: If your planet turned more slowly, you could rest and still be faithful to your duty.

messages.name: Lamplighter
messages.text: That would be pleasant. But pleasant things are not written in my schedule. Good evening. Good morning.
Leaving him felt different from leaving the others. The prince did not laugh. He wished a larger planet could reward faithful labor with sleep.
The geographer seemed wiser at first because books surrounded him. Yet his wisdom depended on explorers, while he never explored his own horizon.

messages.name: Geographer
messages.text: A flower is not reliable evidence. It changes too quickly. Mountains remain; flowers are temporary.
That sentence followed the prince toward Earth. For the first time, the rose seemed not troublesome but fragile, and distance became an ache.
The prince thought often of the lamplighter after leaving him. A faithful person without rest seemed nobler and sadder than a king without subjects.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: If I had stayed, perhaps we could have moved the chair slowly and shared sunsets between duties.
The geographer noticed none of that feeling. He sharpened his pencil, ready to record distant facts, but unable to comfort a traveler before him.

messages.name: Geographer
messages.text: Regret is not geography. Tell me instead whether your volcanoes are active.
The lamplighter remained the one adult whose seriousness seemed connected to service. That difference mattered to the prince more than the man knew.

messages.name: Little Prince
messages.text: If I ever become serious, I hope it is for a lamp or a flower, not for a ledger.
The geographer gave him direction, but the lamplighter gave him an example of duty with a human cost.
